name: Liquid Glass UI Frontend
description_en: A detailed build spec for a React + Tailwind v4 page with an immersive video background and a stylized 'liquid glass' footer.
description_zh: 一份详细的构建规格：用 React + Tailwind v4 实现带沉浸式视频背景与风格化“液态玻璃”页脚的页面。
long_en: A precise frontend-generation prompt: it specifies fonts, exact 'liquid glass' CSS (backdrop blur, inset highlights), and use of motion/react for animation and lucide-react for icons to build an immersive video-background page with a glass footer.
long_zh: 一份精确的前端生成提示词：规定字体、完整的“液态玻璃”CSS（背景模糊、内阴影高光），并用 motion/react 做动画、lucide-react 做图标，构建带玻璃页脚的沉浸式视频背景页面。
sec_note_en: Plain-text build spec; references third-party packages (Tailwind v4, motion/react, lucide-react) and remote font URLs. Vet external font/CDN sources before production use.
sec_note_zh: 纯文本构建规格；引用第三方包（Tailwind v4、motion/react、lucide-react）及远程字体 URL。投入生产前请审查外部字体/CDN 来源。
